pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Jackson dependencies to versions compatible with the new stack.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Jackson versions may have compatibility issues with newer JDKs or Spring 6; updating ensures binary compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Maven compiler plugin to a version that fully supports JDK 21 compilation features.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugins may not correctly handle JDK 21 language features or bytecode generation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade OpenAPI Generator plugin to a version that supports the new Jakarta EE configuration options.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of the plugin may not support the useJakartaEe flag or newer type mappings.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add type mappings in OpenAPI generator to map OffsetDateTime to LocalDateTime and Double to BigDecimal.
pom.xml.why_exists: This is a configuration preference for data types, not a strict JDK compatibility requirement.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update project metadata to reflect the rebranding from Wise to Duffel.
pom.xml.why_exists: This is a cosmetic change for project identity.
pom.xml.before:
<name>Wise Java SDK</name>
-    <description>Java library for Wise API.</description>
pom.xml.after:
<name>Duffel Java SDK</name>
+    <description>Java library for Duffel API.</description>

pom.xml.why_exists: This is a version management change.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade various other Maven plugins and dependencies to their latest stable versions.
pom.xml.why_exists: These are maintenance updates to keep the build toolchain current.

src/test/java/com/duffel/sdk/DuffelInteg.general_idea: Rename test method to reflect the correct account type (Duffel instead of Wise).
